stemHtml: What are the correct values for the navigational light?

options.a: 110 degrees red light on the left wing, 140 degrees white light aft position, 110 degrees amber light on right wing.
options.b: 110 degrees red light on the left wing, 140 degrees white light aft position, 110 degrees green light on the right wing.
options.c: 110 degrees white light on the left wing, 140 degrees green light aft position, 110 degrees red light on right wing.
options.d: 110 degrees red light on the left wing, 140 degrees white light forward position, 110 degrees green light on right wing.
